sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the bottom-right panel now shows:
- Row 1: red, red, blue
- Row 2: red, center, blue
- Row 3: blue, blue, red
This is the pattern R, R, b / R, center, b / b, b, R which has 180° rotational symmetry. But the level still isn't complete.
I've tried many patterns now. Let me think about this problem differently. Maybe the goal isn't about matching a specific pattern at all. Maybe I need to look at the center pieces more carefully.
Let me look at the center pieces in each panel:
- Top-left center: different pattern
- Top-right center: different pattern
- Bottom-left center: different pattern
- Bottom-right center: different pattern
Maybe the center pieces encode the answer. Let me look at the center piece colors more carefully.
Actually, let me try a completely different approach. Maybe I need to click on the SOURCE panels to "transfer" their pattern to the bottom-right panel. Or maybe I need to click on the center pieces of the source panels.
Let me try clicking on the center of the top-left panel to see if it does anything.
The top-left center is around row 12-13, col 14-15 (based on the segmentation data).
Actually, let me try clicking on the gray frame around the bottom-right panel. Maybe that does something.
Looking at the segmentation, the gray frame pieces are:
- id=33: g, pixels=20, boundary=[[32, 32], [32, 37], [33, 37], [33, 34]]
- id=34: c, pixels=496, boundary=[[32, 38], [32, 55], [33, 55], [34, 56]] (this is the charcoal background)
- id=35: g, pixels=20, boundary=[[32, 56], [32, 61], [37, 61], [37, 60]]
These are the gray corner pieces of the frame. Let me try clicking on one of them.
Actually, let me try clicking on the top-left source panel's center to see if it "selects" that panel's pattern.
The top-left center is at approximately row 12-13, col 14-15.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current bottom-right: R, R, b / R, center, b / b, b, R (180° symmetric)
# Level not complete. Let me try clicking on the top-left source panel's center to "select" it.
# Top-left center is around row 12-13, col 14-15

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 12, 'col': 14}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
